fields.description:
## What

The central index `docs/README.md` is incomplete and mixes living reference docs with
historical evidence. Four living/normative top-level docs are unlinked:
`attest-substrate.md` (living developer API ref), `review-policy.md` (normative
policy), `session-id-shims.md` (living reference), and `dco-rollout-evidence.md`
(historical). The index also lists historical records (`bash-migration.md`,
`88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md`) alongside living references with no distinction.

## Scope
- Add index entries for the missing **living/normative** docs (`attest-substrate.md`,
  `review-policy.md`, `session-id-shims.md`).
- Give historical evidence a clearly-labeled home: a "Historical evidence" section in
  the index and/or move those files under `docs/archive/` (git-mv, update inbound
  links). Candidates: `dco-rollout-evidence.md`, `88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md`,
  `bash-migration.md`.
- Establish a short taxonomy convention (living reference / policy / design rationale /
  historical evidence) documented at the top of the index so future docs land in the
  right bucket. (A full per-file taxonomy was produced by the audit and is in the
  epic's trail.)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every living/normative top-level `docs/*.md` is linked from `docs/README.md`.
- [ ] Historical evidence is visually/structurally separated from living references
      (section label and/or `docs/archive/` relocation with links updated).
- [ ] A brief taxonomy note explains the buckets.
- [ ] The index is complete and correct such that the docs-index CI gate added by
      sibling `f088` (which `depends_on` this ticket) passes once wired — i.e. this
      ticket makes the index gate-clean; it does NOT require `f088` to exist first
      (that would be circular).

Files: `docs/README.md`, plus relocated/updated: `docs/dco-rollout-evidence.md`,
`docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md`, `docs/bash-migration.md`.
